//: Recruitable party members. They are built through the same CharacterFactory as the player: race + class + attributes → skills, stats, abilities. Recruit them with the {"type":"recruit"} dialogue effect.

partyMembers.name: Maren Vael
partyMembers.bio: Forewoman of the Greyreach quarry until the quarry stopped echoing back. She has opinions about that, and a hammer.

partyMembers.name: Issi
partyMembers.bio: The Hush took her village and gave her back. She remembers every song it swallowed, and means to return them all.
